title: Pouvoirs britanniques
text_preview: The Rt Hon George Robertson, MP, Her Majesty's Principal Secretary of State for Defence, is hereby granted full powers to sign. on behalf of the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, the Convention between the Governments of the United Kingdom, the French Republic, the Federal Republic of Germany, and the Italian Republic, on the establishment ofthe Organisation for Joint Armament C…

pages.text:
The Rt Hon George Robertson, MP, Her Majesty's

Principal Secretary of State for Defence, is hereby granted full powers to sign.

on behalf of the

Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and

Northern Ireland, the Convention between

the

Governments of the United Kingdom, the French

Republic, the Federal Republic of Germany, and the

Italian

Republic, on the

establishment ofthe

Organisation for Joint Armament Cooperation.

In witness whereof I, Robin Cook, Her Majesty's

Principal Secretary of State for Foreign

and

Commonwealth Affairs, have signed these presents.

Signed and sealed at the Foreign and Commonwealth

Office, London, the Fourteenth day of August, One thousand Nine Hundred and Ninety-eight.

Lodi Cool
